channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: .NET MAUI Open Source Toolkit Released by Syncfusion | Revolutionizing Cross-Platform Development
item.description: Syncfusion releases open source UI controls for Microsoft .NET MAUI, enabling high-performance cross-platform app development on iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The Rise of AI: OpenAI Hires Chief Economist to Tackle Economic Impacts - A Game-Changer for Job Creation?
item.description: OpenAI hires chief economist Aaron Chatterji to examine economic impacts of artificial intelligence, aiming to ensure benefits are widely distributed and inform transition to an AI-driven economy.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
